variants.title: Executive Operating System
variants.prompt: A premium clean cinematic hero video for ClearForge, an AI operations and growth systems company. Show a dark executive operating surface, not outer space: crisp glass-like value-chain lanes and precise brass and emerald signal paths moving through growth, service, operations, quality, knowledge, and margin nodes. Small opportunity signals appear, are scored, routed into workflows, and converge into one disciplined AI operating machine with human approval nodes represented only as simple warm control points. The left 45 percent stays darker and calmer for headline readability. Ultra clean, polished, high-end consulting, practical, grounded, expensive, sharp edges, smooth slow motion, seamless loop, 16:9 website hero background. No people, no faces, no hands, no robots, no logos, no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no dashboards, no UI screenshots, no charts, no city skyline, no sci-fi clutter, no film grain, no noise, no bokeh, no shaky camera, no heavy blur.

variants.title: Signal Flywheel No Text
variants.prompt: A premium abstract cinematic website hero loop for ClearForge. Build the scene only from unmarked physical forms: dark glass plates, thin brass paths, emerald light pulses, small plain circular nodes, and clean transparent layers. Faint scattered opportunity points organize into a disciplined flywheel, then flow through simple workflow paths and return as a quiet feedback loop. The composition is crisp, minimal, executive, practical, and calm, with dark negative space across the left 45 percent for headline copy. Smooth slow camera drift, stable focus, seamless loop, 16:9. Absolutely no text, no words, no labels, no letters, no numbers, no glyphs, no icons, no dashboards, no UI panels, no charts, no maps with labels, no people, no faces, no hands, no robots, no logos, no city skyline, no film grain, no noise, no bokeh, no shaky camera, no heavy blur.

variants.title: Value Chain Scan
variants.prompt: A premium abstract cinematic hero video for an AI operations consulting company. A dark industrial value-chain map appears across the frame like a living operating system. Subtle brass and cool blue signals move through sales, service, production, finance, and leadership nodes. Small growth opportunities light up in sequence, then connect into one precise AI machine with human operator nodes still visible. The feeling is executive, practical, high-trust, fast, efficient, and premium. No text, no letters, no logos, no people, no faces, no UI screenshots, no charts with readable labels. Smooth camera drift, shallow depth, clean dark background, seamless loop, website hero background, 16:9.

variants.title: Operator AI Loop
variants.prompt: A refined cinematic abstract animation showing humans and AI working as one operating machine. Dark background with precise brass, white, and cool-blue signal lines. Human decision nodes pulse gently, AI agent nodes process signals, and outputs flow toward faster service, higher quality, better margin, and growth. The composition should leave the left side slightly darker for website headline readability. No readable text, no logos, no faces, no hands, no humanoid robots, no clutter. Premium consulting brand, elegant, calm, loopable, 16:9 hero background.

variants.title: Market Advantage Machine
variants.prompt: An executive-level abstract film loop about finding growth spots and building an AI advantage machine. A field of faint industry signals becomes organized into a disciplined operating system. Bright opportunity points appear, connect to workflow paths, then accelerate into a clean flywheel. The mood is premium, strategic, trustworthy, and grounded, like a high-end AI transformation website for mid-market companies. Keep motion slow and elegant. Dark left-side negative space for headline copy. No text, no numbers, no logos, no people, no city skyline, no generic sci-fi robot. Seamless loop, 16:9.
